content: I'm happy I didn't use my private email address in REVIEWERS. Since the merge of rust-for-linux, I've been getting noticably more spam and I've also been signed up for several US supposedly job sites (haven't clicked on anything to check if it is actually true).

Yeah, spammers definitely fetch emails and other data from the kernel tree. Not only them, I recall emails (supposedly from universities) about things like filling a "survey for kernel maintainers" or similar studies around the kernel, which could be very well semi-targeted attacks. Be extra careful, and definitely avoid following links.
Yeah, so far everything except for those two "job sites" is untargeted, but I will be careful. I don't get much mail that are not spam, zulip notifications or from a linux mailing list there anyway.
